objective: Deliver a production-grade API-backed durable Operator Console matching canonical archived package 6 R4 across every page and workflow.

execution_snapshot.source_rule: Every implementation and review worktree must sync latest origin/dev and run the canonical archive Fleet Source Preflight before visual completion.

existing_prerequisites.scope: Shell command palette and task center

completion_rule: /operator is React and contains no design iframe.
All five workspaces and all R4 panels are reachable and API-backed.
Every write survives reload and creates the required decision and audit evidence.
Server RBAC tenant scope idempotency privacy and correlation requirements pass tests.
Local and staging product E2E pass without skipped product gates.
The dev revision is promoted to main with rollback evidence.
global_guardrails: Use the origin/dev project layout and compose existing FIN task work.
Do not import or embed prototype HTML in product components.
Do not represent fixture fallback as live data.
All writes require Idempotency-Key and X-Correlation-Id.
High-risk decisions require reason evidence actor role model version and dataset snapshot.

tasks.title: Lock R4 design baseline and page acceptance matrix
tasks.summary_zh: 歷史任務：以 package 5 固化 R4 設計、hash、頁面清單與 branch truth；package 6 provenance 由 R4-013 更新。
deliverables: R4 screen and dialog inventory with stable selectors
Archive checksum and demo version receipt
Current main versus origin/dev truth table
Original package 5 source-provenance statement
acceptance: Every R4 screen maps to exactly one implementation task and E2E assertion.
The receipt records md5 78b65c33fac19dc33ba241e640df5cd1 and oday-plus-r4-20260707.
The historical receipt remains traceable and is superseded for source provenance by R4-013.
Reviewer can identify design source branch source and release blockers without chat history.

tasks.title: Converge active Operator work and establish modular R4 contracts
tasks.summary_zh: 以 origin/dev 為基線整合既有 FIN 分支，固定 React route、模組化 Operator API、R4 DTO、持久化 seed 與 adapter 契約。
deliverables: One canonical React route and no product iframe
Operator subrouters/services split by shell store growth network governance
Typed read/write DTOs and generated client methods
Durable R4 seed using A-100x L-202x CS-100x identifiers
Fixture live stale and permission metadata in all read envelopes
required_contracts: growth opportunities segments priceops drafts outcomes
network zones listings candidates scores comparisons reviews rebalance
govern approvals decisions audit exports sla data-quality models connectors users
acceptance: /operator renders OperatorConsole from apps/web/src/app and contains no iframe.
Domain fleets can edit separate route and service files without touching a monolithic operator.py.
R4 seed reset is deterministic and write reload tests use durable storage.
OpenAPI client compiles and every write contract includes required headers and reason policy.

tasks.title: Complete API-backed Shell and role-aware Today
tasks.summary_zh: 完成 Shell、角色權限、搜尋、通知、核准、Task Center 與六角色 Today；所有數字與 deep link 由 API envelope 驅動。
deliverables: Server-permission-driven workspace navigation
Working global search notifications approvals and task center
Role-specific Today KPI queue approval observation risk and audit regions
Entity deep links preserving workspace tab and selection
acceptance: All six roles receive distinct allowed workspaces and Today content from bootstrap/today APIs.
Search and queue selections open the exact entity and tab.
Header counts match API results after writes without full session reset.
Keyboard navigation and Ctrl/Cmd+K pass accessibility tests.

tasks.title: Implement Store Ops R4 four-light summary and durable issue lifecycle
tasks.summary_zh: 補齊全店四燈摘要與快速篩選，並把 Issue queue、Evidence、Triage 到 Outcome/Close 全流程接到可持久化 API。
deliverables: R4 red orange yellow green summary and source distribution
Quick chips that filter Issue Queue and expose a clear-filter state
Issue detail forecast band evidence tabs action rail and audit timeline
Durable triage assign action field-report outcome escalate reply transfer restart and camera-purpose writes
acceptance: The four-light chips deterministically change the API query and visible queue.
ISS-1024 can complete a valid lifecycle and reload shows persisted state.
Invalid transitions return 409 and duplicate idempotency keys do not duplicate audit rows.
Camera evidence remains locked until a permitted purpose is recorded and audited.

tasks.title: Implement Growth R4 create entries builder and lifecycle
tasks.summary_zh: 在既有 Growth API binding 上補三個建立入口、五步 Draft Builder、衝突 Gate、送審與成效生命週期。
deliverables: Off-peak promotion member recall and PriceOps test entry cards
Five-step builder for setup audience/time impact risk/conflict and approval
Server conflict checks for overlap PriceOps budget fatigue and approval
Pending Approval through Scheduled Running Observing Outcome Ready lifecycle
acceptance: All three entry cards prefill and persist the correct draft type.
Blocked conflict states cannot submit and return actionable server reasons.
Approval creates a Govern item and approval result advances the Growth state.
Effective ineffective and inconclusive outcomes persist and write Decision Log/Audit Trail.

tasks.title: Implement Network R4 expansion stepper and Listing Radar
tasks.summary_zh: 建立 R4 六步 Golden Flow、統一 A/L/CS 資料，完成 Listing Radar 的轉候選、重複合併與硬規封存。
deliverables: Clickable Find Areas to Review stepper with current completed next and blocked states
R4 zone/listing/candidate identifiers and consistent rent/address values
Zone selection chip persisted into Listing Radar filters
Listing conversion dedupe merge hard-rule archive and compliance states
acceptance: HZ-01 to L-2024 to CS-1001 can be completed through product UI and APIs.
Converting L-2024 creates CS-1001 once and navigates to Candidate.
L-2029 merges into L-2025 without deleting source evidence and L-2030 archives with reason.
The real HeatZone map remains nonblank and synchronized with selected zone/lens.
verification: uv run pytest tests/contract -k 'listing or network'

tasks.title: Implement Candidate data gate SiteScore and Compare
tasks.summary_zh: 補 Candidate 資料完整度 Gate、可重跑 SiteScore job、R4 評分卡與比較推薦；缺資料時必須真正鎖住評分。
deliverables: Eleven-field data completeness gate with blocking and confidence rules
Draft Need Data Ready Scoring Evaluated Shortlisted lifecycle
Single and batch SiteScore jobs with persisted model/snapshot results
R4 comparison recommendation and submit-best action
acceptance: Missing address/geocode/rent/area/floor/hard-rule data blocks scoring server-side.
CS-1001 returns GO 82 with SiteScore v2.3 and FS-20260704-0600.
CS-1002 WAIT 76 and CS-1004 REJECT 49 expose the R4 conditions and reasons.
Batch scoring sorts persisted results and Compare recommends GO/alternate/avoid consistently.
verification: uv run pytest tests/contract -k 'candidate or sitescore'

tasks.title: Implement Network Review decision and atomic governance sync
tasks.summary_zh: 完成 R4 Review Decision dialog、角色入口與原因規則，讓 Candidate、Review、Approval、Decision、Audit 在同一交易同步。
deliverables: Approve GO Approve WAIT Return Reject and Override decision UI
Required reason WAIT conditions and override risk confirmation
Reachable decision path for authorized Ops/Govern roles
Atomic candidate review approval decision and audit synchronization
acceptance: Expansion role can prepare/submit but cannot decide.
Authorized reviewer can reach the review from Network or Govern without role-navigation dead ends.
GO maps to Approved WAIT to On Hold Return to Need Data and Reject to Rejected.
A failed transaction leaves all five records unchanged and idempotent replay creates no duplicates.

tasks.title: Implement durable Rebalance AVM and NetPlan workflow
tasks.summary_zh: 把低效重配從展示資料改為 API-backed AVM job、三案 NetPlan 比較、送審與後續執行邊界。
deliverables: Low-efficiency queue four-light history and 90-day trend
Queued running ready failed AVM job states with P10/P50/P90
Keep/Improve Move Exit NetPlan scenarios with constraints and evidence
Audited scenario selection and review submission
acceptance: AVM and NetPlan results are service outputs with model/snapshot metadata rather than UI constants.
A selected scenario persists and reloads with evidence and owner.
Submitting review creates Govern approval and does not falsely mark relocation executed.
Unavailable model/runtime fails closed with an explicit retryable state.
verification: uv run pytest tests/contract -k 'rebalance or avm or netplan'

tasks.title: Expose and bind the complete Govern workspace
tasks.summary_zh: 讓 Approval、Decision、Audit、Evidence Package、SLA、Data Quality、Model、Connector、Users 全部可達並接 API。
deliverables: Nine reachable governance tabs with URL/deep-link state
Approval queue decision log and immutable audit filters
Evidence Package export jobs and retained download records
SLA data-quality model connector and user/role administration read models
acceptance: No governance value builder remains unreachable from UI navigation.
Return/reject require reason and approval policies are enforced server-side.
Evidence export records scope range format actor correlation and retention policy.
Store and Growth decisions plus pending Network approvals appear consistently after reload.

tasks.title: Harden auth tenant isolation idempotency privacy and observability
tasks.summary_zh: 對所有新增 Operator endpoint 套用真實 auth/RBAC、tenant scope、重放去重、不可變稽核、Camera 目的綁定與可觀測性。
deliverables: Auth and permission dependency on every Operator route
Tenant and store scope enforcement
Idempotency replay registry for every write
Structured correlation metrics audit and privacy logging
acceptance: Protected reads return 401 unauthenticated and 403 for unauthorized scopes.
Cross-tenant entity IDs cannot be inferred read or mutated.
Every write is traceable by correlation ID and replay-safe.
Restricted evidence logs contain no media secret or sensitive payload and always include purpose audit.
verification: uv run pytest tests/security tests/integration -k operator

tasks.title: Make full R4 product E2E visual and accessibility gates mandatory
tasks.summary_zh: 建立逐頁、逐角色、跨工作流的產品 E2E；product gate 預設進 CI，並驗證桌面／窄版、視覺、鍵盤、map pixel 與 reload。
deliverables: Page and role coverage matrix
R4 golden-flow browser E2E
API read/write header reload and audit assertions
Desktop constrained-width mobile accessibility and map pixel proofs
Non-skippable CI product gate
acceptance: CI fails when an iframe exists or API read/write proof is absent.
Store Growth Network Review Rebalance and Govern writes survive reload.
All six role allow/deny paths and reason gates are covered.
No major accessibility violations or incoherent overlap occurs at required viewports.
Map canvas is nonblank and interactive in deterministic test mode.
verification: ODP_OPERATOR_PRODUCT_GATE=1 npx playwright test tests/e2e/e2e-operator-console.spec.ts -g ODP-OC-PROD-014

tasks.title: Deploy verify and cut over R4 Operator Console
tasks.summary_zh: 在 staging 執行 migration／seed／auth／runtime 驗證、保存 rollback revision，通過完整 gate 後把 dev 推進 main。
deliverables: Staging revision migration and runtime-mode receipt
OAuth/RBAC and durable DB smoke proof
Full staging browser E2E report
Rollback command and prior healthy revision
dev to main promotion receipt
acceptance: Staging /operator serves React with no iframe and reports the expected revision.
A real staging write reload audit flow succeeds with redacted evidence.
Rollback is rehearsed or safely dry-run with exact commands and revision IDs.
Main contains the accepted dev implementation and all required checks are green.
Final truth status distinguishes fixture simulated staging and live provider evidence.
verification: ODP_OPERATOR_PRODUCT_GATE=1 npx playwright test tests/e2e/e2e-operator-console.spec.ts -g ODP-OC-PROD-014

tasks.title: Refresh R4 baseline provenance to canonical package 6
tasks.summary_zh: 更新既有 R4 implementation matrix 與 baseline receipt，改引用已歸檔的 package 6，證明相對 package 5 的 design delta 為 0，並移除過時缺件敘述。
deliverables: Implementation matrix source header pointing to canonical package 6
Machine-readable receipt with package and extracted-file hashes
Package 6 versus package 5 zero-design-delta statement
Thirty-two screen labels mapped without changing functional scope
acceptance: Both outputs refer to docs_archive/00_source_zips/operator_console/r4-20260707-package-6.
The receipt records ZIP SHA-256 db3ea3d68a16a86fe3161ed0517e6072d962a1f46e6b1b7b89af96687aeb4c76.
The receipt records interactive HTML SHA-256 65d359f4abaf82b39eb16f67da8e91e7ad1b030628bc15f8f45ce7c18c0e2f48 and demo version oday-plus-r4-20260707.
All five extracted hashes match the archive manifest and design_delta_count is zero.
No output says the latest Operator Console design artifact is missing.
No application code or R4-001 through R4-012 functional scope changes.

tasks.title: Publish canonical R4 package 6 and Fleet execution packet to dev
tasks.summary_zh: 把 package 6 原始 ZIP、完整 extracted payload、manifest、逐頁 audit 與 Fleet task pack 正式提交到 dev，確保每個獨立 worktree 可直接核對設計，不再只依賴摘要。
deliverables: Exact package 6 ZIP and all five extracted files tracked on dev
LATEST.json archive README and machine-readable package manifest
Complete Fleet MD/JSON task pack and page-by-page audit
Mandatory source preflight for implementation and review worktrees
acceptance: A fresh origin/dev worktree can read the canonical ZIP extracted HTML manifest audit and task pack.
The tracked ZIP SHA-256 is db3ea3d68a16a86fe3161ed0517e6072d962a1f46e6b1b7b89af96687aeb4c76.
All five extracted hashes match manifest.json and the design exposes 32 unique screen labels.
R4-004 and R4-005 are instructed to sync the delivered source before further visual implementation.
No app module package infrastructure or runtime file changes.
verification: unzip -t 'docs_archive/00_source_zips/operator_console/r4-20260707-package-6/Oday Plus 營運管理後台 (6).zip'
